name: Half-Face Respirator
shortDescription: Twin-cartridge reusable respirator for dust, vapour and fumes.
longDescription: A reusable silicone half-face respirator taking twin bayonet cartridges, so the same facepiece can be configured for particulates, organic vapour, acid gas or combination hazards by changing filters. More economical and better-sealing than disposable masks for regular exposure.

images.alt: Half-Face Respirator supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Filter options
specs.value: P2/P3 particulate, A1 organic, K1 ammonia
